notes: Architecture pivoted from static-only + Pages Function to Astro 6 server runtime + @astrojs/cloudflare + Astro Actions (static-first / dynamic-ready). Plan Task 1/2/12/13/14/15 rewritten accordingly.

tasks.subject: Task 1: 项目骨架与工具链 (server + cloudflare adapter)

metadata.verifyCommand: bun install && bun run build && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && test -f dist/_worker.js
metadata.notes: output: 'server' + adapter: cloudflare(); wrangler.jsonc with nodejs_compat; src/middleware.ts with CSP + placeholder X-Robots-Tag noindex; index.astro has 'export const prerender = true'. @astrojs/cloudflare ^13.5.4.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Cloudflare Workers 部署配置 + 首次部署(仅 *.workers.dev)

metadata.verifyCommand: curl -sI https://<worker>.workers.dev/ | grep -i x-robots-tag && curl -s https://<worker>.workers.dev/robots.txt | grep Disallow
metadata.notes: Workers Builds GitHub integration (not Pages); no custom domain until Task 16; X-Robots-Tag noindex via src/middleware.ts (set in Task 1); robots.txt Disallow: /.

metadata.verifyCommand: bun run typecheck && bun run build && grep -q '東京' dist/index.html && grep -q '东京' dist/zh/index.html

tasks.subject: Task 13: 询价表单 - Astro Action handler + 邮件模板 + 本地链路调通

metadata.verifyCommand: bun run typecheck (Resend dashboard 验收手动)
metadata.notes: Action handler uses import { env } from 'cloudflare:workers'; ctx.locals.cfContext.waitUntil; ActionError({ code, message }). delivered+*@resend.dev tests API only; real 5-inbox delivery = Task 16.

tasks.subject: Task 14: SEO 完整化 + 解除占位反索引

metadata.verifyCommand: bun run build && test -f dist/sitemap-index.xml && grep -q '/zh/' dist/sitemap-index.xml && ! grep -q 'X-Robots-Tag' src/middleware.ts && grep -q 'Allow: /' dist/robots.txt
metadata.notes: Flip robots.txt Disallow→Allow + remove X-Robots-Tag header set in src/middleware.ts (not _headers).

tasks.subject: Task 15: Playwright E2E + GitHub Actions CI

metadata.notes: webServer = 'bun run dev' (astro dev takes over workerd); two projects: Desktop Chrome + iPhone 16 Pro. CI secrets via process.env (no --binding bridge needed).

tasks.subject: Task 16: 性能调优 + 上线冒烟 [user-gate]
